items.title: Most FDA advisers say peptides like BPC-157 and TB-500 should be made available in the U.S. Here’s what happens next.
items.description: The FDA is deciding whether seven peptides can be legally compounded, potentially opening the door to broader use in Americans.

items.title: The August stock-market slump is a myth — so why does Wall Street keep repeating it?
items.description: More than 200 years of data show stocks typically gain in August, while market volatility sits well below average.

items.title: S&P 500 flashes sell signals — options traders are bracing for wild swings in Apple, Meta and Microsoft

items.title: Yes, the AI stock selloff looks terrifying. But it might actually save the bull market.
items.description: The hottest tech trades of 2026 just got slammed — smart investors are buying anyway.

items.title: AMD’s rivalry with Nvidia is increasingly moving into a new realm
items.description: The chip makers are best known for competing in the GPU business, but they’re stepping up their offerings in the attractive market for server CPUs.

items.title: The stock market’s calm is cracking. Here’s how to prepare for an August shock.
items.description: August is historically brutal for market volatility. Here’s how to protect your portfolio.

items.title: Trump rolls out a new wave of global tariffs. Here are the latest rates.

items.title: ServiceNow’s stock falls as a new AI threat overshadows earnings beat

items.title: These 16 states are offering tax-free shopping days as back-to-school costs soar to over $800 per student
items.description: As inflation continues to squeeze household budgets, parents and students are on a mission to find back-to-school bargains.

items.title: Tesla sees a $214 billion wipeout as investors pan Elon Musk’s plan to spend ‘as fast as we can’
items.description: Tesla’s stock has its worst drop in a year after the company’s earnings call leaves Wall Street with more questions than answers.
